## UserRuntime.UserLibraryRuntime class

Implementation of user library runtime materialization.

Provides: - On-demand materialization of persisted sessions - Caching of materialized sessions - Creation and persistence of new sessions

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class UserLibraryRuntime implements IUserLibraryRuntime 
```
**Implements:** [IUserLibraryRuntime](./ts-chocolate.userruntime.iuserlibraryruntime.md)
